node.statement: HIGHER REPLICAS: For depolarizing noise, dominant permutations in large-N limit are identity e and cycle s for any α. H_α(γ) = (1-α)^{-1} log_d[(1-(d^2-1)γ/d^2)^α + (d^2-1)(γ/d^2)^α]. Finite-depth corrections scale identically for all α. For Setup II: f_α = -α/((α-1)N) log_d F̃ = 1-r gives the transition. [Eqs.(25-27), main.tex lines 359-387]
